## Checklist

- [ ] Headless smoke test passes (`from gnm_maya import smoke_test; smoke_test.run()` under mayapy)
- [ ] GUI smoke test passes in Maya (`gnm-maya/tests/gui_smoke_test.py`) if the change touches the UI

- [ ] No model weights, runtimes or other binary blobs committed (the repo ships code + docs only)
